attributes.description: Insider-threat-focused view of Chromium-browser internet history parsed by Hindsight. Downloads are the headline panel — full width at the top — because file-acquisition is the most concrete browser artifact in an insider case (and often the only one that proves a binary actually landed on disk). Below: typed URLs (intent), exfil channels (file-sharing / personal cloud / personal webmail / AI assistants / canary tokens), job-search activity (departure signal), and the raw Timeline.

attributes.title: Browser History (Hindsight)
